# desec_record (Data Source)

Retrieves a specific DNS Resource Record Set (RRset) from a deSEC domain.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a specific RRset
data "desec_record" "www_a" {
  domain  = "example.com"
  subname = "www"
  type    = "A"
}

output "www_ips" {
  value = data.desec_record.www_a.records
}

output "www_ttl" {
  value = data.desec_record.www_a.ttl
}

# Look up the MX record at the zone apex
data "desec_record" "mx" {
  domain  = "example.com"
  subname = "@"
  type    = "MX"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name.
- `subname` (String) The subdomain part of the record name. Use `@` for the zone apex.
- `type` (String) The DNS record type (e.g. `A`, `AAAA`, `TXT`).

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Timestamp of RRset creation in ISO 8601 format.
- `name` (String) The full DNS name of the RRset.
- `records` (Set of String) The set of record content strings.
- `touched` (String) Timestamp of when the RRset was last touched.
- `ttl` (Number) The TTL (time-to-live) in seconds.
